name: black-rose-bay-bridge-sf-side-night
founder_lock_quote: realistic night scene from the San Francisco side of the bay bridge facing oakland
scene_description: Photorealistic cinematic night scene from the western (San Francisco) end of the San Francisco-Oakland Bay Bridge, looking eastward across the Bay toward Oakland. The Bay Bridge's iconic self-anchored suspension cables and steel girders extend into the foreground and middle distance, lit by amber sodium-vapor bridge lights along the deck. Bay water below shimmers with rippling reflections of bridge lights. Oakland skyline rises in the far distance — Port of Oakland's massive white container cranes silhouetted against the dark Oakland Hills, low-rise downtown Oakland buildings to the north, the warm lights of Jack London Square along the East Bay waterfront. A waxing moon casts cool silver light across the scene. Wet bridge deck and steel cables catch the moonlight. Atmospheric depth — distant Oakland softly fading into cool night haze. Single black rose with stem laid across the bridge railing at center-foreground, droplets of bay mist on its petals — armor and conviction made tangible.

lighting.key_light: waxing moon overhead, slightly behind camera — cool silver direct
lighting.rim_light: amber bridge deck sodium-vapor along cables
lighting.exposure_mood: FOG cinematic restraint, no warm tones except distant city lights
lighting.shadows: deep, hard-edged on bridge steel, soft on water

camera.perspective: from western SF end of Bay Bridge deck looking east toward Oakland
depth_cues: Oakland skyline + Port of Oakland cranes far distance
camera.composition: 3:4 portrait, strong vertical with bridge cables leading eye
camera.atmospheric_fog: subtle bay mist receding into distance

skyyrose_dna: BR canon: armor not flower — a conviction. Concrete is the only soil that matters. Oakland Deep East. The Bay Bridge looked at from the SF side facing home. Beauty forces through cracks. Silver on near-black, no warm tones except the city you came from. FOG cinematic restraint.

focal_anchor.object: single deep-black rose with stem and leaves
focal_anchor.position: center-foreground, resting across the bridge railing
focal_anchor.detail: single bead of bay mist on topmost petal catching moonlight
focal_anchor.rationale: BR canon — armor and conviction made tangible at the bridge railing

product_staging_zones.fit: draped over or beside the railing focal area
product_staging_zones.lighting_match_directive: match cool silver moonlight + amber bridge underlighting

product_staging_zones.fit: laid on wet bridge deck reflecting silver

negative_prompts: no people, no human figures, no silhouettes
no traffic, no vehicles, no headlights on bridge
no warm tones in foreground (warm only in distant Oakland city)
no flower-garden context (BR is armor, not flora-decorative)
no Golden Gate Bridge (Bay Bridge ONLY — locked canon)
no Disney-polish, no soft pastels, no neon
reference_brands: Fear of God cinematic sepia/cool restraint

atmospheric.mood: armor, refusal, dignity, deep East coming home
atmospheric.sound_implied: distant foghorn, bridge cable hum, bay water
